# Generic → Generic Add/Subtract

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

Main table → Generic → Generic Add/Subtract

Generic Add/Subtract

Instruction Type and Width          Instruction description
                                    Performs configurable addition/subtraction between two
                                    sources using CISA. The addends, operations and signs are
Vector Generic Add/Subtract         user configured according to configuration register set. Each
                                    source is either 32-bit or 40-bit according to the register type. he
                                    destination is 40-bit.
                                    Performs configurable addition/subtraction between two
                                    sources using CISA. The addends, operations and signs are
Vector Generic Add/Subtract Long    user configured according to configuration register set. Each
                                    source is either 64-bit or 72-bit according to the register type.
                                    The destination is 72-bit.
                                    Performs configurable addition/subtraction between two
                                    sources using CISA. The addends, operations and signs are
Vector Generic Add/Subtract Words   user configured according to configuration register set. Each
                                    source is either 16-bit or 20-bit wide. The results are 20-bit wide,
                                    each is packed into 40-bit destination.
